zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford是Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford的女兒，出生。她和Ralph De Neville至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford是Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford的女儿，出生。她和Ralph De Neville至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford was born as the daughter of Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford. She had at least 1 daughter with Ralph De Neville.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford est née, fille de Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Ralph De Neville.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford wurde, als Tochter von Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford geboren. Sie hatte mit Ralph De Neville mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford è nata il come figlia di Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Ralph De Neville.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret StaffordはHugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Staffordの娘として生まれた。彼女はRalph De Nevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford(은)는 Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Ralph De Neville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford nasceu filha de Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Ralph De Neville.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford родилась. Её отца звали Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Ralph De Neville.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford nació como hija de Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Ralph De Neville.
